title: Non-domestic energy affordability support schemes: evaluation
body: "The non-domestic energy affordability support schemes were implemented from 2022 to 2024 to support businesses, public and voluntary sector organisations during a period of exceptional energy price rises.  The schemes in scope of this evaluation are the:   Energy Bill Relief Scheme (EBRS) Energy Bill Discount Scheme (EBDS) Non-Domestic Alternative Fuel Payment (NDAFP) scheme   This report covers the process, impact and value for money evaluations of the schemes.   Reports on the evaluation of the domestic schemes are published separately:   Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Great Britain Domestic energy affordability support schemes in Northern Ireland    "
